ogTitle: Robertsons Beach vs Robinvale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Robertsons Beach and Robinvale.
heading: Robertsons Beach vs Robinvale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Robertsons Beach, Victoria and Robinvale, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Robinvale has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Robertsons Beach (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Robertsons Beach or Robinvale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Robertsons Beach has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Robinvale scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Robertsons Beach scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Robinvale scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Robertsons Beach or Robinvale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Robinvale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
